perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a white dress and a beige cardigan, stands in front of a Costco freezer aisle. She gestures towards bags of Kirkland Signature shrimp. (2) She moves to a horizontal glass-top freezer, points inside excitedly, and pulls out a large clear bag of frozen white shrimp, holding it up for the camera to see. (3) A close-up shot of the shrimp bag occurs where a hand enters the frame to give a thumbs up next to the product for a size comparison. (4) The scene transitions to an indoor dining setting where the woman and another female friend, wearing a hat, are sitting at a table eating the cooked shrimp, smiling and giving thumbs up to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced electronic pop background music plays throughout. A female voice speaks with high energy and an enthusiastic tone. (2) A male voice is heard off-screen, interacting playfully with the female speaker, creating a conversational and humorous atmosphere. (3) Sounds of environmental chatter and the two women reacting to the food with sounds of enjoyment (e.g., 'Mmm') and excited speech are layered over the continuous upbeat BGM.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: Subtitles in traditional Chinese translate the dialogue regarding shrimp recommendations and prices (e.g., '908克只要699元'). (2) Decorative/Effect Text: A large 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo is fixed at the top. Variety-show style hooks like '最新夯蝦!' (Latest hot shrimp!) and '只會買這款蝦? 該換品項買囉!' (Only buy this shrimp? Time to change!) appear in bold, colorful fonts. (3) Hook Text: '好廚師阿頭上菜' and '留言+1' appear at the end to encourage viewer interaction.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Intro at store -> Product discovery/comparison -> Home cooking/tasting session -> Outro/CTA

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female friend at the end, 1 male hand giving a thumbs up in the middle.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white tiered dress and a cream-colored cardigan with black stripes.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The first half is set inside a Costco warehouse with large freezers and product shelving. The second half is set in a domestic dining area with a table and home decor.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Problem -> Alternative Solution -> Evidence/Results -> CTA
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To provide a product recommendation for a specific type of frozen shrimp at Costco. The video uses a 'hidden gem' discovery format where the creator suggests an alternative to the standard Kirkland shrimp, demonstrating its size, value, and taste to persuade the audience to try it.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The video explicitly highlights the price, quantity, and quality of a specific Costco product, encouraging users to comment '+1' for cooking instructions.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-energy variety-show style text overlays and a focus on cost-performance (CP value).
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video effectively uses scale comparison (hand vs. shrimp) to provide visual proof of value, which is a common and effective tactic in grocery-focused social media content.
